title: Safe Trace Event
description: Deterministic contract for customer-safe agent technical telemetry.

request_id.description: Correlation ID for the end-to-end request.

operation_type.description: The category of the operation being traced.

tool_outcome.description: Technical success or failure of the tool call.

duration_ms.description: Latency of the operation in milliseconds.

latency_bucket.description: Latency bucket for coarse-grained performance analysis.

evaluation_score.description: Optional evaluation score associated with the turn.

safety_outcome.description: High-level safety result from content filters.

sanitized_summary.description: High-level diagnostic summary without technical details.

error_category.description: Controlled enum for friendly error categories without technical details.
